chunks.en: Last week I found a bug in our login page at work.
chunks.ja: 先週、職場でログインページの不具合を見つけました。

chunks.en: The main problem was that the page froze after I clicked submit.
chunks.ja: 主な問題は、送信を押した後にページが固まることでした。

chunks.en: First I wrote down clear notes about what I saw on screen.
chunks.ja: まず、画面で見たことを分かりやすくメモに書き留めました。

chunks.en: Then I told my team on Slack and added a screenshot too.
chunks.ja: それからSlackでチームに伝えて、スクリーンショットも添えました。

chunks.en: To show the problem, I listed the steps to make it happen again.
chunks.ja: 問題を見せるために、再現するための手順を並べて書きました。

chunks.en: When the bug got fixed, I felt really happy and relieved.
chunks.ja: その不具合が直ったとき、とても嬉しくてほっとしました。

outline: Opening: found a login bug at work
Point 1: wrote notes and told the team on Slack
Point 2: shared steps to reproduce the problem
Wrap-up: felt happy and relieved when it was fixed

modelTalk.text:
Last week I found a bug at work. I was testing our app, and a button just didn't work. When I clicked "save," nothing happened. That's when I knew something was wrong. So I wrote it down right away in my notes. I like to keep things simple and clear. Then I told my team in our chat.

To show the problem, I took a few steps. First, I opened the same page again. Next, I clicked the button slowly, and I took a screenshot. I also wrote down what I did, step by step. That way, my team could see it too.

A day later, someone fixed it. I felt so happy and a little proud. It's a nice feeling when you help make something better. I'll keep reporting bugs, because small ones can cause big trouble.

chunks.en: The last bug I noticed at work was a broken login button on mobile.
chunks.ja: この前仕事で気づいた不具合は、モバイルでログインボタンが動かないというものでした。

chunks.en: When I find a problem, I usually write it down in a short ticket first.
chunks.ja: 問題を見つけたとき、私はたいてい最初に短いチケットにメモします。

chunks.en: To show the problem, I take a screenshot and list the exact steps to reproduce it.
chunks.ja: 問題を見せるために、スクリーンショットを撮り、再現する正確な手順を書き出します。

chunks.en: After that, I tell my team on Slack and tag the right developer.
chunks.ja: その後、Slackでチームに伝えて、担当の開発者にメンションします。

chunks.en: When it got fixed, I felt really relieved because users could finally log in again.
chunks.ja: それが直ったとき、ユーザーがやっとまたログインできるようになったので、本当にほっとしました。

outline: Opening: the bug I found at work
How I record and report it to the team
Steps I take to reproduce and show it
Wrap-up: how I felt when it was fixed

modelTalk.text: Last week at work, I found a bug in our app. When I clicked the save button, nothing happened at all. My work just disappeared, and that's really frustrating for users. So I wrote it down right away in a quick note. I like to keep things clear, so I don't forget the details later. Then I told my team on our chat channel. To show the problem, I took some screenshots and made a short video too. I also listed the exact steps I did before it broke. That way, my teammates can follow along and see it themselves. A few days later, one developer fixed it and asked me to test again. I clicked save, and it worked perfectly this time. Honestly, I felt so relieved and a bit proud. It's a great feeling when a small report actually helps.
